title: Chapter 83
content:
Chapter 83: Chapter 83: The Hands of a Lecher

The ornate carriage rolled steadily over the uneven cobblestones of the city streets, its suspension absorbing the worst of the bumps, but leaving a rhythmic, continuous sway inside the cabin.

For Kai, sitting directly across from Su Mei, that gentle swaying was a visual feast of biblical proportions.

With every slight lurch of the carriage, Su Mei’s massive, heavy breasts bounced. The crimson silk of her tight qipao strained against the twin peaks, the fabric stretching and settling over her deep cleavage in a mesmerizing, gelatinous dance. She didn’t try to hide it. In fact, the way she leaned back against the plush velvet cushions, her arms resting elegantly on the armrests, only pushed her chest out further, offering the spectacular jiggle up to him like a royal banquet.

"I have to say... you’ve grown up pretty much," Su Mei purred, a wicked glint in her heavily lined eyes.

"I’ve had to, Aunty," Kai replied, his voice a low, smooth baritone that vibrated in the small space. He let his dark eyes drag slowly from her bouncing cleavage up to her glossy red lips. "Life in the outer district forces a boy to become a man very quickly."

Su Mei hummed, a throaty, appreciative sound. She uncrossed her legs, letting her knees fall open just a fraction. The high slit of her dress parted slightly, revealing the smooth, sheer silk of her stocking clinging to her thick calf.

"Your mother tells me you are quite the responsible young man now," Su Mei noted, her gaze tracing the broad line of his shoulders and the thick muscles of his neck. "She relies on you heavily. It is... very attractive, finding a man who can carry a heavy burden."

"I like carrying heavy things," Kai stated, looking pointedly at her chest, then back to her eyes. "I find I have a lot of stamina."

Su Mei let out a breathy laugh, her chest heaving violently with the sound. The blatant innuendo was exactly what she had hoped for. The air in the cabin was already growing thick, heavy with the scent of her rose perfume and the undeniable, primal musk of two predators circling each other.

"Stamina is a rare commodity in the inner city," Su Mei sighed. She shifted her weight, bringing a manicured hand up to massage the back of her own neck. She rolled her shoulders, an action that caused her massive breasts to heave and sway aggressively.

She let out a soft, sultry groan, her eyes fluttering shut for a moment.

"Ah... running the Jade Lotus Pavilion is so incredibly exhausting," she complained, her voice turning whiny and delicate. "Managing all those spoiled noblewomen, overseeing the servants... and my husband is entirely useless. He only cares about his ledgers and his concubines. He never pays attention to my...

needs

."

She opened her eyes, looking at Kai with a manufactured, yet highly effective, vulnerability.

"My muscles are always so tight, Kai," she whispered, dragging a hand down her own thick thigh, right over the crimson silk. "My back aches, my legs cramp from wearing these heels all day. I am just... so very tired."

Kai watched her hand caress her own thigh. His

Intelligence 11 saw right through her act. She wasn’t asking for pity; she was extending an invitation.

In his mind, a system interface flickered to life.

[Skill Available: Hands of Lecher (Level 1)]

Description: Infuses the user’s hands with a magical, stimulating heat. Increases the target’s physical sensitivity and significantly lowers inhibitions through touch. Perfect for ’massages’.

A dark, dangerous smirk touched the corner of Kai’s mouth.

"That’s a shame, Aunty Su Mei," Kai murmured, leaning forward so his elbows rested on his knees. He closed the distance between them, his face just inches from hers. "A beautiful woman like you shouldn’t have to suffer from tight muscles. It ruins the skin."

Su Mei pouted perfectly. "And what am I to do about it? The masseuses at my parlor are skilled, but their hands are so... weak. I need something firmer."

"Well," Kai said, his voice dropping into a raspy, intimate whisper. "It just so happens that I am actually very good at massages. I have a... natural talent for it."

He raised his large, calloused hands, letting her see the size and strength of his fingers.

"If you want, I can help you loosen up on the ride back."

Su Mei’s eyes widened slightly, her red lips parting. The sheer boldness of the outer district boy was thrilling. Her heart gave a sudden, excited flutter against her ribs.

"Oh?" Su Mei breathed, a flush of heat rising to her cheeks. "You think your rough hands can handle my delicate muscles, Kai?"

"I know they can," Kai promised. "Let me show you."

Su Mei didn’t need to be asked twice. A wicked, hungry smile spread across her face.

"Sure," she whispered. "You can help me."

Without breaking eye contact, Su Mei leaned back into the velvet cushions. She lifted her right leg, the high heel of her shoe clicking softly against the wood, and boldly placed her foot directly into Kai’s lap.

The movement was devastating.

Because her leg was elevated, the high slit of the crimson qipao fell completely open. The silk fabric pooled around her hip, exposing the entirety of her incredibly thick, plush thigh. She was wearing sheer, expensive black silk stockings that clung perfectly to her plump calves, held up by an intricate lace garter belt wrapped tightly around her upper thigh. Above the garter, there was a tantalizing two inches of bare, milky-white skin leading up to her waist.

Kai stared at the expanse of thigh resting across his thighs, the heat of her leg seeping through his Academy trousers, right next to his waking erection.

"My calf is terribly knotted," Su Mei instructed softly, her voice trembling slightly with anticipation.

Kai didn’t say a word. He mentally activated the skill.

[Skill Activated: Hands of Lecher Lvl 1]

Instantly, a surge of warm, tingling energy rushed from Kai’s core down his arms, pooling in the palms of his hands and his fingertips. They felt incredibly hot, vibrating with a subtle, magical frequency.

He placed both hands on her calf, wrapping his long fingers around the thick, silk-clad muscle.

"Ahh!"

Su Mei let out a sharp, genuine gasp the moment his skin made contact. Her entire body jolted, her massive breasts bouncing heavily.

"Kai..." she breathed, her eyes widening in shock. "Your hands... they are so... hot."

It wasn’t just physical heat. The moment the

Hands of Lecher touched her, a wave of liquid pleasure shot straight up her leg, bypassing her brain and striking directly at her womb. The sheer intensity of the sensation made her toes curl inside her high heel.

"Just relax, Aunty," Kai commanded gently, his voice acting as an anchor in the sudden storm of her arousal.

He began to knead the thick muscle of her calf. He didn’t use brute force; he used slow, agonizingly firm pressure. With every squeeze, the magical energy from his skill seeped through the silk stocking, melting the tension in her muscles and replacing it with raw, burning lust.

"Oh... oh heavens..." Su Mei moaned, her sultry facade completely shattering.

She let her head fall back against the carriage wall. Her mouth fell open, a soft, continuous whimper escaping her glossy red lips. The jiggling of the carriage combined with the firm, burning pressure of his hands was driving her insane.

Kai moved his hands higher, sliding over the curve of her knee. The silk stocking was incredibly smooth, offering no resistance to his gliding palms.

"You are very tense here," Kai noted, his thumbs pressing into the soft flesh just above her kneecap.

"Yes... mmph... yes, right there..." Su Mei babbled, her hips subconsciously squirming on the velvet seat. Her massive, heavy breasts heaved with her ragged breathing, the crimson silk looking like it was about to tear from the strain.

Kai slid his hands up. He bypassed the knee entirely and grabbed the lower half of her incredibly thick, soft thigh.

The flesh here was impossibly plush. Kai’s large hands sank deep into the yielding fat and muscle. He squeezed, using the

Hands of Lecher to target the sensitive nerve endings hidden beneath the sheer stocking.

"Aahhn! Kai!" Su Mei cried out, her back arching off the seat.

The pleasure was blinding. It felt like his hands were wired directly to her clitoris. Every time he kneaded her thigh, a pulse of pure, wet electricity shot through her crotch. Her expensive lace panties were already soaked through, sticking uncomfortably to her weeping folds.

"Does that feel good, Aunty?" Kai whispered, slowly dragging his hot palms higher up her thigh, inching dangerously close to the lace garter belt.

"It feels... it feels like magic..." Su Mei sobbed, her heavily lined eyes fluttering open, completely glazed over with lust. She looked at the handsome, muscular boy massaging her leg. He looked like a demon of pleasure.

"Deeper, Kai," she begged, completely throwing away the dignity of a high-class noblewoman. She spread her elevated leg just a fraction wider, giving him better access to the soft, incredibly sensitive inner meat of her thigh. "Please... touch me higher."

Kai smirked, the magical heat in his hands pulsing in rhythm with the throbbing of his own massive, rock-hard erection beneath her resting calf.

"As you wish, Aunty."
